source.business_scenario: 大表 Hash Join 峰值内存高
source.redaction_notes: Synthetic Pagila schema; no real customer data

input.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM rental r
INNER JOIN payment p ON r.customer_id = p.customer_id
INNER JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
